_note: Accuracy floors, relative >5pp gate (evals/baseline_metrics.json), and p95 latency/cost gates (SPEC L131). p95 values read from EvalSample.total_time + EvalSample.metadata.cost_usd in Inspect AI JSON logs.

selection_accuracy.rationale: Sanity floor. Corpus n=30 (SPEC n=30). p95 latency/cost gates per SPEC L131 (8s / $0.05).

selection_heuristic.rationale: Sanity floor. Corpus n=30 (SPEC n=30). p95 latency/cost gates per SPEC L131 (8s / $0.05).

retry_recovery_task.rationale: Deterministic stub. n=3 covers each transient class in _is_transient (ConnectionError, TimeoutError, OSError); a regression removing any class flips one entry. STUB_FAIL_PER_CALL=2 forces the retry path on every distinct call. p95 cost/latency gate omitted: n=3 + retry-domain stub makes the SPEC L131 latency budget meaningless here.
